Both are state assertions about workstream ownership and ticket scope. The actor (019db41d-964a-7000-84cd-b052ca49df60) is the author of the signal and the person making these decisions. No act_ops or resource_ops are warranted — no commitment state transitions are initiated by this signal, and no resources are created/modified.
